top_signals.title: Emerging-Market Assets Rebound Amid Optimism Over Iran War
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market currencies extended an earlier rebound while stocks erased a decline, as oil prices tumbled on optimism over the outlook for the conflict in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan banker fights back over ‘fabricated’ sex harassment claims
top_signals.summary: Female leveraged finance executive says allegations are concocted for ‘improper purpose of personal enrichment’
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fleetworthy debuts connected fleet ecosystem, mobile app at Austin roadshow
top_signals.summary:
Fleetworthy introduced a connected fleet management platform and mobile app during its customer roadshow on Tuesday in Austin, Texas.

The post Fleetworthy debuts connected fleet ecosystem, mobile app at Austin roadshow appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: StanChart does damage control after boss calls staff ‘lower-value human capital’
top_signals.summary: Bill Winters says cutting almost 8,000 jobs reflects changing work practices and not ‘value of our people’
